architecture_overview: The system consists of a single function 'add' which takes two parameters, adds them together, and returns the result.

components.name: add

parameters.name: a
parameters.description: The first number to be added.

parameters.name: b
parameters.description: The second number to be added.

returns.description: The sum of the two input numbers.

components.description: This function takes two numbers as input and returns their sum.

verification_plan: Test the function with various pairs of numbers including positive integers, negative integers, and zero. Verify that the output matches the expected sum.
